name: JDC Burst 1 New DMX

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: C9A4C485-7198-481B-9F6C-F794E44FA610

comment:
GLP JDC Burst 1 New DMX: GDTF JDC Burst 1 New Software V0.3.4.0
The Multi Modes (Mode 3-4-5 and Mode 6-7-8) are prepared for additionally use of RGB(W) Segments in 12-24-48 parts. 
Mode 1-8 available in RGB and RGBW. Included JDC1 Legacy Mode sPix (9) and sPix PRO (10)

gwSpecs.description:
GDTF JDC Burst 1 New Software V0.3.4.0
The Multi Modes (Mode 3-4-5 and Mode 6-7-8) are prepared for additionally use of RGB(W) Segments in 12-24-48 parts. 
Mode 1-8 available in RGB and RGBW. Included JDC1 Legacy Mode sPix (9) and sPix PRO (10)
